metadata.title: Recruitment ATS | AdonERP
metadata.description: AI-powered recruitment platform for all your hiring operations — from job posting and candidate tracking to interview scheduling, pipeline management, and onboarding.

hero.title: Next-Gen
hero.description: Source, track, interview, and hire candidates from one beautiful recruitment pipeline.

pipelineSection.title: Never wonder about a
pipelineSection.description: Get full pipeline visibility from application to offer, so your team always knows what comes next.

visualizeSection.title: Visualize the
visualizeSection.description: Move applicants through your recruitment stages with a clean kanban view, interview status, tags, activities, and notes.

automationSection.title: Don't
automationSection.subtitle: typing
automationSection.description: Automate descriptions using templates and AI. Generate job posts, interview invitations, and candidate messages quickly.

pipelinesSection.title: Tailor-made
pipelinesSection.description: Create custom recruitment steps for every department, job role, and hiring process.

schedulingSection.title: Less scheduling,
schedulingSection.subtitle: more interviewing!
schedulingSection.description: Schedule interviews, send calendar invitations, coordinate with hiring teams, and keep candidates updated automatically.

reportingSection.title: Reporting
reportingSection.description: Look at your hiring data and understand where your candidates come from, how your pipeline performs, and where your team can improve.

features.title: AI in for decision
features.description: Create smart hiring workflows and keep every recruitment step clear.

features.title: Stay on target
features.description: Set hiring goals, interview stages, and follow-up activities for each role.

features.title: Thin the pool
features.description: Score candidates, filter applications, and shortlist the best people faster.

features.title: You're hired!
features.description: Turn a successful applicant into an employee with smooth onboarding.

features.title: Get Feedback
features.description: Send and collect interview feedback from your recruitment team.

features.title: Quick communication
features.description: Contact candidates directly and keep every message attached to the job.

ctaBanner.title: Join 15 million users
ctaBanner.description: who grow their business with Adon

testimonial.quote: Adon saved us plenty of web development time, allowing us to focus on individual strengths, which is immensely helpful for start-ups.
testimonial.name: Daphne Wright
